creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)

It was the WWW that first caught my eye, because I wondered about usage, but that can be discussed elsewhere, and I'm not in a rush. 

Looking closely at the description, a nit: 

man pages (with a space)
manpage   (without)

man(7) uses the non-abbreviated phrase 'manual pages' so FWIW, I'd go for non-abbreviated and with a space. 

Ta
